tasks.title: [RED] Explorer tests

tasks.title: [GREEN] Explorer implementation

Create src/apcore_a2a/explorer/index.html: self-contained HTML with no CDN deps — agent card display, skills list, message composer, SSE stream viewer, task state viewer.
